column1: The Cosmograph Daytona collection (Reference Number: 116578SACO) has a case size of 40, with a Mother of Pearl Diamond Dial and Chronograph, Small Seconds, Stop Seconds complications, all with a retail Price of 75540.0
The Cosmograph Daytona collection (Reference Number: 116588SACO) has a case size of 40, with a Diamond Dial and Chronograph, Small Seconds complications, all with a retail Price of 68700.0

The Cosmograph Daytona collection (Reference Number: 116588TBR) has a case size of 40, with a Pave Diamond Dial and Chronograph, Small Seconds, Stop Seconds complications, all with a retail Price of 102240.0
